ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "major_roads" TEXT /* List of major roads in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "major_roads" TEXT /* List of major roads in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_functions" (
  "road_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road function type */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the road function type (e.g., highway, residential) */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Typical speed limit for the road function */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Average daily traffic volume for the road function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., collision, breakdown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level associated with the incident type (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition (e.g., clear, rainy) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility conditions (e.g., clear, foggy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the incident */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity level at the time of the incident */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collision factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the collision factor */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level associated with the collision factor (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
